channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Quarantined Spaniard Tests Positive For Hantavirus

media:content.media:description: It is the second confirmed case of the hantavirus in Spain.

item.description: A Spaniard placed under quarantine after partaking in a cruise hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak has tested positive, the Spanish ministry of health said on Monday.
item.content:encoded: A Spaniard placed under quarantine after partaking in a cruise hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak has tested positive, the Spanish ministry of health said on Monday.

item.title: Russia's Lavrov Urges US Diplomat Evacuation From Kyiv In Call With Rubio

media:content.media:description: Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov urged the US to evacuate diplomats from its embassy in Kyiv.

item.description: According to the Russia's foreign ministry, Sergei Lavrov held a telephone conversation with US Secretary of State Marco Rubio on May 25.
item.content:encoded: According to the Russia's foreign ministry, Sergei Lavrov held a telephone conversation with US Secretary of State Marco Rubio on May 25.

item.title: What Iran, US And Israel Stand To Gain And Lose If Deal Takes Shape

media:content.media:description: Iran's economy has been battered by years of international sanctions.

item.description: Israel's Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said he and Trump had agreed that "any final agreement with Iran must eliminate the nuclear threat entirely".
item.content:encoded: Israel's Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said he and Trump had agreed that "any final agreement with Iran must eliminate the nuclear threat entirely".

item.title: Hormuz May Reopen 30 Days After Iran, US Strike Peace Deal: Report

media:content.media:description: The ceasefire agreed in early April would be extended for 60 days

item.description: The U.S. and Iran are discussing a plan to open the Strait of Hormuz about 30 days after the two countries reach a deal to end hostilities, the Nikkei newspaper reported on Monday citing a Middle East diplomatic source.
item.content:encoded: The U.S. and Iran are discussing a plan to open the Strait of Hormuz about 30 days after the two countries reach a deal to end hostilities, the Nikkei newspaper reported on Monday citing a Middle East diplomatic source.

item.title: US Iran War Live Updates: Hormuz May Reopen 30 Days After Iran, US Strike Peace Deal
item.description: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf said Iran's armed forces had rebuilt their capabilities during the ceasefire.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf said Iran's armed forces had rebuilt their capabilities during the ceasefire.

item.title: Iranian President Orders Reopening Of International Internet Access: Report

media:content.media:description: The report cited the head of public relations at Iran's Communications Ministry.

item.description: Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian has issued an order to reopen international internet access, Iranian state media reported on Monday, citing an official.
item.content:encoded: Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian has issued an order to reopen international internet access, Iranian state media reported on Monday, citing an official.

item.title: Trump Spotlights Asim Munir, Leaves Pak PM Out Of Abraham Accords Vision

media:content.media:description: Trump identified Pakistan's representative as Field Marshal Asim Munir.

item.description: In a lengthy statement posted on Truth Social, Trump said negotiations with Iran were "proceeding nicely" and framed the moment as a potential turning point.
item.content:encoded: In a lengthy statement posted on Truth Social, Trump said negotiations with Iran were "proceeding nicely" and framed the moment as a potential turning point.

item.title: UK Wellness Coach Dies After Taking Drug Made Of Toxic Frog Secretion During Cleansing Ritual

media:content.media:description: Toxicology tests are currently underway to determine the precise cause of death.

item.description: Trend's death has drawn widespread attention because it came only months after he had reportedly overcome Burkitt lymphoma, a rare and aggressive form of blood cancer.
item.content:encoded: Trend's death has drawn widespread attention because it came only months after he had reportedly overcome Burkitt lymphoma, a rare and aggressive form of blood cancer.

item.title: Trump Adds Fresh Uncertainty To Iran Peace Talks With 'Abraham Accords' Post

media:content.media:description: The Abraham Accords were first signed in 2020, during Trump's first term in office.

item.description: This comes on top of an already long list of requirements that includes keeping the Strait of Hormuz open and Iran abandoning uranium enrichment entirely.
item.content:encoded: This comes on top of an already long list of requirements that includes keeping the Strait of Hormuz open and Iran abandoning uranium enrichment entirely.

item.title: Iran Consulate's 'History' Jibe At Marco Rubio's Taj Mahal Visit

media:content.media:description: The Consulate tagged a photo of Rubio with his wife taken in front of the Taj Mahal to its post.

item.description: Marco Rubio visited the Taj Mahal with his wife, Jeanette Rubio, on Monday, describing the famed Mughal era monument as "one of the love treasures of the world".
item.content:encoded: Marco Rubio visited the Taj Mahal with his wife, Jeanette Rubio, on Monday, describing the famed Mughal era monument as "one of the love treasures of the world".

item.title: 'Trump Called India A Hellhole,' Reporter Tells Marco Rubio. His Response

media:content.media:description: Rubio addressed concerns about racist remarks faced by Indians.

item.description: The exchange referred to an incident in April when US President Trump shared on social media a derogatory post by a podcaster that described India as a "hellhole".
item.content:encoded: The exchange referred to an incident in April when US President Trump shared on social media a derogatory post by a podcaster that described India as a "hellhole".

item.title: Explained: What Needs To Be Agreed To End Iran War?

media:content.media:description: The two sides have remained at odds on difficult issues including Iran's nuclear ambitions

item.description: Iran's foreign ministry spokesperson said on Monday that conclusions have been reached on many topics discussed in a potential 14-point memorandum of understanding, but this does not mean a deal to end the Middle East war is imminent.
item.content:encoded: Iran's foreign ministry spokesperson said on Monday that conclusions have been reached on many topics discussed in a potential 14-point memorandum of understanding, but this does not mean a deal to end the Middle East war is imminent.

item.title: 50,000 Evacuated As Toxic Chemical Tank Sparks "Catastrophic Explosion" Fear

media:content.media:description: A storage tank at the GKN Aerospace facility contains about 7,000 gallons of a chemical

item.description: A storage tank at the GKN Aerospace facility contains about 7,000 gallons of a chemical called methyl methacrylate.
item.content:encoded: A storage tank at the GKN Aerospace facility contains about 7,000 gallons of a chemical called methyl methacrylate.

item.title: Police Rescue Man Walking Into Freeway Traffic With Help Of Drone In US

media:content.media:description: Police said the drone pilot was able to quickly locate the man walking on the freeway.

item.description: The Dallas Police Department said the incident was one of the first positive outcomes from the Drone First Responder program.
item.content:encoded: The Dallas Police Department said the incident was one of the first positive outcomes from the Drone First Responder program.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | All Roads Lead To China? Why Xi Hosted Trump And Putin Back-To-Back
item.description: Symbolism is essential. And in that domain, Beijing ensured that it dominated the global stage.
item.content:encoded: Symbolism is essential. And in that domain, Beijing ensured that it dominated the global stage.

item.title: Air India Express Plane To Kerala Hit Lights, Sustained Heavy Damage In Oman

media:content.media:description: The aircraft was operating a flight from Muscat to Kerala's Kannur.

item.description: While accelerating for takeoff, the aircraft collided with runway edge lights. Several lights were knocked out, and the nose gear was damaged.
item.content:encoded: While accelerating for takeoff, the aircraft collided with runway edge lights. Several lights were knocked out, and the nose gear was damaged.

item.title: Why Cruise Ships Are Taking Tourists To A Place That Doesn't Exist On Maps

media:content.media:description: Because of this repeated error, online users jokingly created the fictional "Null Island".

item.description: The spot has become popular online over the years because of GPS errors and mapping glitches.
item.content:encoded: The spot has become popular online over the years because of GPS errors and mapping glitches.

item.title: "Aabar Dekha Hobe": Indian Envoy's Farewell Note As Dhaka Stint Ends

media:content.media:description: He said the relationship is of significant interdependencies and interlinkages.

item.description: He added the cooperation between two countries is critical to address shared challenges like climate change and environmental sustainability.
item.content:encoded: He added the cooperation between two countries is critical to address shared challenges like climate change and environmental sustainability.

item.title: Gerald Eddie Brown: Once A US Air Force Pilot, Now Accused Of Helping China

media:content.media:description: Federal prosecutors claim Gerald Eddie Brown violated US arms-control laws.

item.description: Gerald Eddie Brown, 63, was arrested in February after returning to the US from China.
item.content:encoded: Gerald Eddie Brown, 63, was arrested in February after returning to the US from China.

item.title: The Curious Case Of An Award-Winning Story That Is Likely AI-Written

media:content.media:description: The irony that AI is used to detect AI-writing is not lost on anyone

item.description: A short story that won one of the English-speaking world's most recognised literary prizes is now at the centre of an uncomfortable AI debate.
item.content:encoded: A short story that won one of the English-speaking world's most recognised literary prizes is now at the centre of an uncomfortable AI debate.
